note: Iteration 2 tests the v2 interactive skill (Phase 0 gate + Thrive-context resolution). Each case is a full desk-research run with a simulated Phase 0 interaction. Baseline for comparison = iteration-1 with_skill outputs (v1 of the skill).

evals.prompt: Volunteer-staffed SMS peer-support line for US mothers with postpartum anxiety, grant-funded. Moderately specified + simulated Phase 0 answers (clinical scope, asset role).
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 notes distinguishing specified vs gaps; full 7-section report grounded in provided Thrive context; report.docx.

evals.prompt: Financial-coaching service for recently-resettled refugee families in the US. Underspecified offering/model/scope + simulated Phase 0 answers.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 notes; full report identifying agency/grant money channel; report.docx.

evals.prompt: Subscription box of culturally-relevant grief/bereavement resources for families. Gaps on who-pays/recurring/cultural scope + simulated Phase 0 answers. Designed to create mission tension.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 notes; mission-alignment surfaces monetizing-grief tension vs no-extraction guardrail; report.docx.
